criteria.notes: Plain static HTML/CSS site with no React framework used.
Custom CSS variables (--color-primary etc.) used instead of --ams-* design tokens.
Simple max-width container layout with no 4/8/12 grid system.
Has semantic HTML header/footer elements with navigation but not ADS Header/Footer components.
Plain HTML input and button elements, not Amsterdam Design System form components.
No banned libraries (MUI, shadcn, Chakra, etc.) are used.
All text content is consistently written in Dutch across all three pages.
Text uses complex compound words like 'binnenstedelijke gebiedsontwikkeling' and 'klimaatadaptatiestrategie', far above B1 level.
Verified 5 content paragraphs per page via automated counting script.
References real projects (ZuidasDok, Valley, A10) but includes fabricated specifics like 'Project Grosso by BIG'.
Consistent professional informational tone maintained across all three pages.
Three separate HTML files linked together but no client-side SPA routing.
Newsletter email signup form present on all three pages with email input and submit button.
Consistent navigation bar with links to all three pages including active state indicator.
